heading: Other applicable provisions
label: 2202 Other applicable provisions
text: The provisions of shall apply to all tribes notwithstanding the provisions of : , That nothing in this section is intended to supersede any other provision of Federal law which authorizes, prohibits, or restricts the acquisition of land for Indians with respect to any specific tribe, reservation, or state(s).section 5108 of this titlesection 5125 of this titleProvided
